sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, name String, description String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Münchener', 'Streß'), (2, 'Jürgen', NULL), (3, 'Ääö', 'Normal'), (4, 'Test', '');
SELECT id, translateUTF8(name, 'üß', 'us') AS translated_name FROM test_strings WHERE translated_name IN (SELECT description FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1);

SELECT id, translateUTF8(name, 'üß', 'us') AS translated_name FROM test_strings WHERE translated_name IN (SELECT translated_name FROM (SELECT translateUTF8(description, 'Ääö', 'Aaeo') AS translated_name FROM test_strings WHERE description IS NOT NULL));
SELECT id, translateUTF8(name, 'üß', 'us') AS translated_name FROM test_strings GROUP BY translated_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE chars (id UInt32, char_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO chars (id, char_value) VALUES (1, '🍕'), (2, '😊'), (3, ''), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, translateUTF8(char_value, '', '') AS no_change FROM chars WHERE no_change IN (SELECT char_value FROM chars WHERE char_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, translateUTF8(char_value, '🍕', 'pizza') AS converted_value FROM chars HAVING converted_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (id UInt32, numeric_value Float64, text_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO mixed_data (id, numeric_value, text_value) VALUES (1, 123.456, 'Sample 1'), (2, 789.012, 'Sample 2');
SELECT id, translateUTF8(text_value, '1', 'one') AS modified_text FROM mixed_data WHERE numeric_value IN (SELECT numeric_value FROM mixed_data WHERE numeric_value > 100);
